hooks.command: cd /Users/igorgurbamov/carwash-portal && if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx tsc --noEmit --project apps/web/tsconfig.json 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi

cd /Users/igorgurbamov/carwash-portal && if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js)$'; then npx eslint "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" --max-warnings=0 2>&1 | tail -10 || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|DROP TABLE|DELETE FROM.*WHERE 1=1|git push --force'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command requires explicit confirmation' && exit 1; fi
